results.title: Dave Asprey Mold Free Remineralized Danger Coffee
results.content:
Danger Coffee's process blends extremely high quality, mold-free, lab tested coffee beans with humic and fulvic to remineralize your body with more than 50 trace minerals and electrolytes. This leaves you feeling energized, engaged, and in the zone, it’s just enough to make you dangerous! Unlike other drinks promising enhanced energy - you can forego jitters and crashes all while drinking the daily cup of joe that you’re already drinking. No bizarre concoctions required.   
  
What are Fulvic and Humic minerals? [...] For more information on the benefits of Humic and Fulvic, click here.   
  
If you have any more questions about coffee brewing or anything else, feel free to reach out to us! [...] Humic and fulvic acids are both molecules that come from substances known as “humates”. Humates are a combination of organic substances created as a result of the decomposition of plant and animal tissues that have been compressed over millions of years in the earth’s soil. They're all-stars of soil - essential components that help make the whole system work better to enrich plants with the minerals that our bodies so desperately need. Plants grown in soil rich with humic substances produce higher yields, provide better nutrition, and are less subject to stress, compared with plants grown in soils lacking these nutrients. The benefits of humates and other humic substances are extensive. They’re a rich source of highly bioavailable micronutrients, minerals, energy, and beneficial bacteria

results.title: What is Remineralized™ Coffee — and Why Does It Matter?
results.content:
## COFFEE ROASTING & THE REMINERALIZATION PROCESS

Once at the roaster, Danger Coffee beans are checked for any defects from shipping before roasting to your specification. The final step before they are packaged is remineralization, where Danger Dust™, a proprietary blend of fulvic and humic minerals, is added to the beans. [...] Danger Coffee delivers micronutrients plus gives you access to the minerals you already have.  Mineral and nutrient deficiencies are a big deal. If you're deficient in one or more minerals, you may experience fatigue, stress, brain fog (Source), and increased susceptibility to sickness (Source). Danger Coffee’s patent-pending process remineralizes your body with more than 50 trace minerals and electrolytes, leaving you feeling energized, powerful, and ready for anything. These micronutrients enter the cells to boost performance and bind to toxins to provide detoxification support (Source). The truth is, you probably need more minerals than you’re getting in order to achieve optimal health, hydration, and human performance.  

## ROLE OF MINERALS IN YOUR ENERGY, FOCUS, AND HEALTH [...] ## 

## KEY BENEFITS OF FULVIC AND HUMIC MINERALS

Fulvic and humic are soil-based compounds with extensive benefits (Source). They’re a rich source of highly bioavailable micronutrients, minerals, electrolytes, and antioxidants which support overall health (Source).  

### Fulvic - Often called Nature’s Miracle Molecule, is a mighty antioxidant, free radical scavenger, and powerful natural electrolyte.

Fulvic Supports: (Source) 

Gut Health 

Detoxification 

Reduces oxidative stress within cells 

Nutrient absorption 

Immune Function

### Humic - Can collect and bind unwanted elements to provide detoxification support.

Humic supports:

Optimizes gut health and function (Source) 

Binds toxins (including mycotoxins) (Source) 

Protects cells from free radicals (Source)

results.title: Is Danger Coffee Worth It? My full review - The Fitnessista
results.content:
Their patent pending remineralization process uses humic and fulvic acids to deliver more than 50 trace minerals and electrolytes to your body. This means feeling more energized, engaged, and in the zone every day.

Smooth Taste: Danger Coffee has a smooth, non-bitter taste, making it enjoyable for both black coffee drinkers and those who prefer to add milk or sweeteners.

Energy Boost: Beyond the typical caffeine kick, Danger Coffee is said to provide a sustained energy boost without the usual crash, thanks to its clean and high-quality beans. I feel a little bit of energy from the decaf version and it think it’s from the minerals.

collagen coffeecollagen coffee

collagen coffee
collagen coffee

### Cons of Danger Coffee [...] ### Pros of Danger Coffee

High-Quality Beans: The beans are sourced from high-altitude regions, which are known to produce some of the best coffee beans in the world. This typically results in a richer, more robust flavor.

Clean and Toxin-Free: One of the standout features of Danger Coffee is its rigorous testing for mold and toxins. This is especially important for those who are health-conscious and want to avoid any potential contaminants in their coffee.

“Remineralized” Coffee: The cells in your body require minerals to function, just as they require vitamins “Humates,” formed by decaying plant and animal matter in soil, produce humic and fulvic acids which enrich plants with minerals, bioavailable nutrients, energy, and beneficial bacteria. [...] Experiment with Recipes: Danger Coffee’s smooth taste makes it versatile for various coffee recipes. Try it in a Bulletproof Coffee recipe for an added energy boost, or simply enjoy it black to savor the full flavor.

Timing: Drink your coffee at strategic times during the day. Mid-morning is ideal for most people to avoid the afternoon crash and ensure a good night’s sleep. I like to have coffee after breakfast.

### Is Danger Coffee Worth It?

If you’re serious about your coffee and health, Danger Coffee is definitely worth a try. Its high-quality beans, clean and toxin-free guarantee, and smooth taste make it stand out in the crowded coffee market. Yes, it’s a bit pricier than your average coffee, but the benefits it offers can make it a worthwhile investment.
